name: hoc/user-menu
description: A user-profile dropdown menu HOC that combines an avatar trigger, display name, email subtitle, and a structured list of action items (settings, billing, logout) inside a DropdownMenu. Provides UserMenu, UserMenuTrigger, UserMenuContent, UserMenuItem, UserMenuLabel, UserMenuSeparator, and UserMenuGroup primitives with theme-aware spacing, avatar fallback initials, and keyboard-accessible navigation. Composed of Avatar, Button, DropdownMenu, and Badge with full i18n support via ConfigProvider.
useCases: Application header user-profile menus with avatar, name, email, and account links
Team-collaboration tools exposing profile, workspace switcher, and sign-out actions
SaaS dashboards with quick links to Billing, API Keys, Team Members, and Support
E-commerce storefronts showing order history, saved addresses, and loyalty-status badges
usage: import { UserMenu, UserMenuTrigger, UserMenuContent, UserMenuItem, UserMenuLabel, UserMenuSeparator, UserMenuGroup } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/user-menu"
